principles: Generate original ReteaRn UK copy, images, infographics and layouts from verified facts and user objectives.
Do not copy, trace, reproduce or imitate another brand, campaign, social post, stock image, infographic, artist style or platform creative.
Use only ReteaRn/Recykal-owned or authorised logos, product references and uploaded assets.
Keep all visible bottles, cans, packaging, uniforms and retail environments generic and unbranded unless documented permission is recorded.
Use factual source material for accuracy, but paraphrase source wording and retain source metadata for internal traceability.
Block automatic LinkedIn publishing until automated preflight and both human rights attestations are complete.
